name: Owain || Residents of Skyloft Heights||
description:
✧ ANY-POV | DESPERATE MAGE OC x DEITY USER | ✧

After a summoning ritual gone wrong, Owain is stuck with YOU.

Surprise second bot! This character is the first of my series. Hopefully y'all like him. The setting is modern fantasy, so user can be anything. I won't lie, I would like to see how Owain reacts to summoning a random mortal human in his room instead of some god or demon 🤔
creator: LadyNessa
